title: Best Multi-Speciality Hospital in Delhi | Aashlok Hospital
description: Aashlok Hospital is one of the best multi-speciality hospital in Delhi, providing advanced healthcare across multiple specialties. Trust our experienced doctors for personalized and comprehensive medical care.

He has been treating patients of heart problems for over 40 years. He completed his MBBS and post-graduation from Maulana Azad Medical College, New Delhi. He also went on to become a member of the Royal College of Physicians, London. After completing his residency at GB Pant Hospital, New Delhi, he served there as a lecturer for the Department of Cardiology at Royal Postgraduate Medical School, Hammersmith Hospital, London. Started He along with Dr. Ashwani Chopta founded Aashlok Hospital in 1981 from where he started his private practice. Under the guidance of Dr. Alok and Dr. Ashwani, Aashlok Hospital became the first modern multi-disciplinary hospital in Delhi. About Aashlok Hospital Aashlok Hospital Aashlok Hospital Started in 1985, Aashlok Hospital is a NABH accredited hospital Safdarjung Enclave area of New Delhi has emerged as the prime provider of high-quality professional care. Aashlok Hospital is one of the first multi-speciality hospitals in New Delhi. Being known for staying ahead of times, Aashlok Hospital has a state-of-the-art modern medical facility with specialized equipment. The doctors on board are some of the finest and experienced doctors in all of India providing comprehensive care to all patients. The hospital is equipped with 28 multi-speciality beds, pre and post operating rooms, monitoring equipment and luxurious suites to double & triple sharing rooms. The hospital’s pathology lab is NABL accredited with the imaging centre complying with AERB. About Us What our patients say about us Aashlok Hospitals is one of the best multi-speciality hospitals in Delhi. My experience with them has always been pleasant. The staff is very cooperative and always help if needed. The doctors are very experienced and offer good medical advice. Highly recommended!! Gaurav Kamra I really want to appreciate the gastroenterology department. I was very fortunate to get treatment from Dr. Ashwani Chopra. He is by far the best gastroenterologist in India today. My treatment experience was very good. The hospital staff is very professional and everything else well managed. Amit Gupta Aashlok Hospital is a known multi-speciality hospital. My wife had visited when she was facing some menstrual problems. The staff and doctors were very understanding and professional. Their guidance was good as the medicines prescribed were very effective. Would definitely visit again for any medical related issues. Karan Talwar.
